rukawa past story

. . .

rukawa who is chubby and ugly back then has no friends because of his appearance , some kids would make fun of him for how he looks and act which make rukawa heartbroken . he also try to be closer with this girl since most of the girl in his kindergarten was friendly but the girl push him till he fall down and everyone laugh at him causing him to cry , the teacher pull him to her room to call rukawa mom to pick him up - since rukawa was afraid to go back to school he has to homeschool till he recovers .
